name: Kingshot - Flow 1 Gift Code Sync and Queue FINAL

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/150.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
    SELECT
        $1::jsonb AS codes_json,
        $2::text AS source_name,
        $3::text AS source_url,
        $4::boolean AS ok
),
current_codes AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT BTRIM(value) AS code
    FROM input_data,
         jsonb_array_elements_text(codes_json)
    WHERE ok = TRUE
      AND NULLIF(BTRIM(value), '') IS NOT NULL
),
upsert_source AS (
    INSERT INTO public.gift_code_sources (
        name,
        url,
        is_active,
        last_fetched_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        source_name,
        source_url,
        TRUE,
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM input_data
    WHERE ok = TRUE
    ON CONFLICT (url)
    DO UPDATE SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        is_active = TRUE,
        last_fetched_at = NOW(),
        updated_at = NOW()
    RETURNING id
),
insert_new_codes AS (
    INSERT INTO public.gift_codes (
        code,
        source_id,
        status,
        first_seen_at,
        last_seen_at,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        cc.code,
        us.id,
        'active',
        NOW(),
        NOW(),
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM current_codes cc
    CROSS JOIN upsert_source us
    ON CONFLICT (code)
    DO NOTHING
    RETURNING id, code
),
touch_existing_codes AS (
    UPDATE public.gift_codes gc
    SET
        last_seen_at = NOW()
    FROM current_codes cc
    WHERE gc.code = cc.code
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM insert_new_codes nc
          WHERE nc.id = gc.id
      )
    RETURNING gc.id
),
mark_missing_inactive AS (
    UPDATE public.gift_codes gc
    SET
        status = 'inactive',
        updated_at = NOW()
    FROM upsert_source us
    WHERE gc.source_id = us.id
      AND gc.status = 'active'
      AND NOT EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM current_codes cc
          WHERE cc.code = gc.code
      )
    RETURNING gc.id, gc.code
)
SELECT
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM current_codes)::int AS fetched_code_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM insert_new_codes)::int AS new_code_count,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mark_missing_inactive)::int AS inactive_code_count,
    COALESCE(
        (SELECT jsonb_agg(code ORDER BY code) FROM insert_new_codes),
        '[]'::jsonb
    ) AS new_codes;

WITH created_queue AS (
    INSERT INTO public.gift_code_redemptions (
        gift_code_id,
        game_account_id,
        status,
        queued_at,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        gc.id,
        ga.id,
        'pending',
        NOW(),
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM public.gift_codes gc
    CROSS JOIN public.game_accounts ga
    WHERE gc.status = 'active'
      AND ga.is_active = TRUE
      AND (
          gc.expires_at IS NULL
          OR gc.expires_at > NOW()
      )
    ON CONFLICT (gift_code_id, game_account_id)
    DO NOTHING
    RETURNING id, gift_code_id, game_account_id
)
SELECT
    COUNT(*)::int AS created_queue_count
FROM created_queue;
